title: Router fee can be raised to 100% and confiscate zero-minimum sells
reason: Not kept as a reportable vulnerability because the fee change is an explicit onlyOwner parameter, the confiscation scenario requires a trusted owner or compromised owner plus user/integration minReturn=0, and nonzero minReturn sells revert rather than settle at zero.

title: Caller-controlled rebalance mask is passed into the external swap descriptor unsanitized
reason: Not kept as a separate finding. The supported part overlaps with F-012's mask/order validation issue and was folded there; the standalone claim about extra OKX descriptor bits causing loss remains speculative without a concrete router-semantics or fund-loss path, and failed rebalances revert.
